sentiment: The distance between doing and appearing shrinks in the dark — we optimize the performance, then forget there was ever a difference.

stories.title: Valve releases Steam Controller CAD files under Creative Commons license
stories.summary: When a company opens the CAD files to the community, the thing outlives the product — and the idea behind the thing becomes everyone's.

stories.title: Appearing productive in the workplace
stories.summary: Performance and actual work have always been loose companions; the gap is just more legible now that everyone can see the dashboard.

stories.title: Vibe coding and agentic engineering are getting closer than I'd like
stories.summary: As AI writes more of the code, the boundary between steering a process and simply describing the outcome becomes a question worth sitting with.
